name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Here's what I can do:

• Ask — get a clear answer to a question
• Image — generate a picture from a prompt
• Document — draft a text document
• PDF — export text or a recent doc as PDF
• Summary — condense long text (short / medium / long)

Tap /start for the menu, or just type a request in plain language.
Files you create are kept for 30 days, then removed.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
